ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code for the dataset series */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "long_definition" TEXT /* Long definition of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the dataset (e.g., human capital, economic indicators) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the data */,
  "periodicity" TEXT /* Periodicity of the data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "reference_period" TEXT /* Reference period for the data */,
  "statistical_concept_and_methodology" TEXT /* Statistical concept and methodology used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_link" TEXT /* Link to the dataset file */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Rating or score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is distributed */,
  "data_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags for easier search and filtering */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source's website or documentation */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, NGO, private) */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Rating or score indicating the reliability of the source */,
  "source_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the source information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_url" TEXT /* URL to more detailed information about the topic */,
  "topic_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags for easier search and filtering */,
  "topic_relevance" TEXT /* Rating or score indicating the relevance of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `users` table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `user_roles` table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `user_permissions` table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `datasets` table */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `users` table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `datasets` table */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `users` table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `datasets` table */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
